title: Grid Identity, Coordinates, Geometry, and Units · Code Recall
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs grid identity, coordinates, geometry, and units from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for typed logical-grid and viewport geometry model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent stable row-column identity separately from storage offset, graph vertex, pixel rectangle, and display label.
Convert between row-column, linear index, logical point, and Canvas coordinates with explicit origins and axis direction.
Name cells, pixels, logical units, scale factors, padding, and line widths in every geometry formula.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

steps.title: Maze solving, Tkinter, and Python Separate evidence from confidence · Review Geometry Properties
steps.instruction:
review case — A review puzzle team handles case 9829 during a keyboard-only puzzle tournament. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile logical grid identity, viewport geometry, units, and coordinate round trips; event-loop work must remain cancellable; then switch the solver or generator and restate each guarantee. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates. Competency probe: Test round trips, adjacency, boundary ownership, positive sizes, and changed viewport dimensions.

steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Geometry Properties: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review puzzle team handles case 7142 during a clean desktop release rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile logical grid identity, viewport geometry, units, and coordinate round trips; the prior good state must survive failure; then replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts, focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, and packaged desktop behavior require explicit controlled native transfer gates.
